problem id: 71e6cae8
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(4) AND SHR(7)

examples:
  11011110 -> 00000001
  10110011 -> 00000001
  01011111 -> 00000000
  10001010 -> 00000000
  11101010 -> 00000000
  00101100 -> 00000000
  01101001 -> 00000000
  01111101 -> 00000000

query: 01100101
predicted answer: 00000000
